---
title: "Natalie Beenaerts" 
subtitle: "Professor - head of the Field Research Centre"
page-layout: full
toc: false
image: images/placeholder.jpg # Use same image as the card on people.qmd
about:
  template: trestles 
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:natalie.beenaerts@uhasselt.be
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/natalie-beenaerts-b6499936/
    - text: "{{< fa brands orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5655-5943
    - text: "{{< fa brands researchgate >}} ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Natalie-Beenaerts
---

## About Me



---

## Research Interests

* 

---

## Publications

* 

## Other Outreach 

### Articles 

* 

### Conference presentations

* 

### Info days 
* 
---
